beats.text: People collect data about all kinds of things. Look at these three tables. Which data would HAVE to use Scale of 2?
Which data would HAVE to use Scale of 2?

validator.description: Student selected Table B, Coins Collected with values 7, 12, 19, 23

params.description: Table B highlights to confirm selection.

beats.text: The coin counts: 7, 12, 19, 23. None of them end in 0 or 5, so Scale of 2 is the only way to show them exactly.

beats.text: Remember this quick check: Do all the numbers end in 0 or 5? If yes, you have options. If no and the numbers are small, Scale of 2 is your go-to.
